github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Prefix: use conventional commit format: '<type>(<scope>):' Type must be one of the following: build, ci, docs, feat, fix, perf, refactor, test. Scope is optional and must be (if present) one of the following: lab, rum, collect, sitemap, links, cli, prompts, profiles, utils.
<short summary> Summary must be in present tense, not capitalized, no period at the end. Max 100 characters for the full header.
